# Columns are (1) wavelength in nm, (2) transmission in %.

# Table: Filtros FW1-2 Stand down June 2017_graph.xls
# Author: Hwihyun Kim
# Created: August 29, 2017
#
# Effective wavelength
# 662.0
# lambda HaC_G0337
